name: io.github.codespar/mcp-getnet
description: MCP server for Getnet — Santander-owned Brazilian acquirer. Credit, debit, Pix, boleto + marketplace seller onboarding and split.

environmentVariables.name: GETNET_SELLER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Getnet seller_id issued with your merchant contract

environmentVariables.name: GETNET_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Getnet API base URL. Defaults to production (https://api.getnet.com.br). Use https://api-homologacao.getnet.com.br for sandbox.
